text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
99 
MDCR_PTA_TOTAL_FFS_SPEND 
LABEL: 
Medicare FFS Payment Amount — Part A 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payment amount from all Part A claims for the beneficiary during 
the year. Note that only fee-for-service (FFS) claims are included. The Part A claims include: Inpatient, 
skilled nursing facility (SNF), home health agency (HHA), and hospice. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Inpatient,
